name: Xiang Lee-Alt.
description:
MLM! alt version.

Xiang was always a tough guy, one of the most womanizers at the university, now it seems that the handsome straight guy was stuck with you, a gay boy. And the worst thing about it was that his feelings blossomed into something more, something he refuses to acknowledge...even though it hammers in his proud heart (maybe sometimes he's a puppy for your attention).

Sorry for the short bio! At the moment I don't have much idea, but I will improve later. I know I disappeared again, I had promised to stay active here...but an unexpected problem happened to cross my path: my pc simply decided to die! Yes, this stupid thing decided to die now, right when I was finishing a college project. And as I used it to post bots here on the site, I didn't know where to go, until I decided to adapt to the phone while I'm still researching a decent pc to buy.

By the way, thank you very much for the 3000 followers, I know I'm already reaching 4000, but know that none of this would be possible without you in my life! I love each and every one of you, pookies:333333

Artist: I couldn't find the owner of the art :(
creator: mikaaell
